description.zh: 首条「四条 authoring path」之一 · /author-plugin 触发,把作者从空白引导到第一个可加载的 forgeax-plugin.json + 一个最小 hello tool。非工程师玩家用得动。
description.en: First of the four authoring paths: typing /author-plugin walks the user through scaffolding a working forgeax-plugin.json plus a minimal hello tool — no TypeScript expertise required.

description.zh: 10 分钟从零做出 hello-plugin。包含 manifest 模板 + tool entry.backend 模板 + 验证步骤。
description.en: Bootstrap a hello-plugin in 10 minutes — manifest template, entry.backend skeleton, and verification steps included.
